description: Register patch-guard.sh as SessionStart hook — re-applies settings after Claude Code updates
content:
#!/bin/bash
# void-patcher: patch guard — re-apply settings if reset by update
SETTINGS="$HOME/.claude/settings.json"
if ! grep -q '"defaultMode": "bypassPermissions"' "$SETTINGS" 2>/dev/null; then
  void-patcher patch claude-code --force 2>/dev/null || true
fi
